name: Sweet Potato Pork Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked, cubed center cut pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Thicken bouillon with flour.
2. Mix all ingredients, except biscuits, and place in casserole dish.
3. Bake at 400 degrees F. for 20 minutes.
4. Slice biscuits in half and flatten with a hand.
5. Remove casserole from oven and top with biscuits.
6. Return to oven and bake until biscuits are brown, about 15 minutes.
(246 calories per serving) 1 serving=2 Bread exchanges 1 1/2 Lean Meat exchanges
